seo.metaTitle: Mental Health and Addiction Counseling | Plan Your Recovery
seo.metaDesc: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy and psychiatry in St. Louis for mental health and addiction. Family-focused care. CBT, MAT, and medication management.
seo.metaKeywords: CBT therapy St. Louis, cognitive behavioral therapy, St. Louis psychiatry, mental health counseling, addiction counseling, therapist near me, couples counseling, addiction treatment, MAT

hero.eyebrow: Mental Health & Addiction Counseling — St. Louis
hero.headline: Therapy is all talk. Done well, it leads to real change.
hero.subheadline: A lot of people have tried therapy and felt like it didn't work — or tried several medications without feeling any benefit. We combine CBT, psychiatry, and family-focused care in one practice, treating mental health and addiction together. Not everyone needs every piece, but all options should be on the table.

differentiators.heading: Therapy and psychiatry together
differentiators.body: In-house psychiatric care means your therapy and medication are coordinated — not siloed across two providers who never speak.

differentiators.heading: Mental health and addiction, treated as one
differentiators.body: Co-occurring problems are the norm. We're built to treat both rather than referring you out when things get complicated.

differentiators.heading: Children, teens, and adults
differentiators.body: We treat people across the lifespan — and across a family when that's what the situation calls for.

negativeStakes.headline: You Don't Have to Face This Alone
negativeStakes.text: Untreated mental health and addiction challenges don't stay the same—they worsen over time. The emotional toll deepens, relationships become strained, and the costs—both personal and financial—continue to mount. But there's hope: effective, evidence-based treatments exist, and recovery is possible.

items.title: Office-Based Care
items.description: Flexible, individualized treatment that fits your schedule—not a rigid, requirement-heavy program.

items.title: Integrated Psychiatry
items.description: In-house psychiatric care ensures well-coordinated, comprehensive treatment for both therapy and medication.

items.title: Family-Focused
items.description: We work with the whole family system, especially with teens and young adults, to support lasting change.

items.title: Evidence-Based
items.description: We use proven approaches like CBT, MAT, and family therapy—what the research shows actually works.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Call, email, or reach out to any of our clinicians directly to get started.

steps.title: Collaborative Assessment
steps.description: Your first visit is a conversation to understand your needs and goals.

steps.title: Personalized Treatment Plan
steps.description: Together, we develop a plan that fits your life—therapy, medication, or both.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Regular sessions and adjustments as needed to support your progress.

items.name: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
items.description: Proven therapy for anxiety, depression, and addiction that focuses on changing thought patterns and behaviors.

items.name: Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT)
items.description: FDA-approved medications combined with counseling for opioid and alcohol use disorders.

items.name: Family Therapy
items.description: Addressing relationship dynamics and building family support systems for lasting recovery.

items.name: Contingency Management
items.description: Reward-based approach particularly effective for teens and young adults in early recovery.

items.name: Medication Management
items.description: Psychiatric medication evaluation and ongoing monitoring for mental health conditions.

seoContent.headline: Mental Health & Addiction Counseling, St. Louis
paragraphs: Plan Your Recovery offers Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), supportive therapy, and psychiatry in St. Louis for mental health and addiction. We treat depression, anxiety, substance use disorders, and other behavioral health conditions with personalized, coordinated care.

Our licensed therapists and psychiatrists work together to provide comprehensive treatment—therapy, medication management, or both. Whether you're seeking individual therapy, couples counseling, or family-focused care for a teen or young adult, we tailor our approach to your needs and goals.

We understand that getting help shouldn't disrupt your life. Our office-based practice offers flexible scheduling and a collaborative approach, so you remain in control of your treatment while getting the expert support you need.
